skills.name: Aukuras
skills.description: With the energy of sacred Torch, adds damage based on a certain percentage when performing basic or skill attacks
skills.effect_text:
Increases damage by CaptionRatio2 %
Duration: 30 minutes

skills.name: Zalciai
skills.description: Improve the critical rate of Krivis skills.
skills.effect_text:
Critical Attack Damage + CaptionRatio %
Duration: 30 minutes

skills.name: Daino
skills.description: Increases your Accuracy and Block Penetration.
skills.effect_text:
Increases Accuracy by CaptionRatio %
Increases Block Penetration by CaptionRatio %
Duration: 30 minutes

skills.name: Zaibas
skills.description: Create a magic circle that calls down bolts of lightning on an enemy using the power of the God of Thunder.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3 per 0.15 seconds
Targets: CaptionRatio3
Number of attacks: 4
Magic Circle Duration: 5 seconds

skills.name: Divine Stigma
skills.description: Engrave a stigma on the enemy and continuously deal Holy property magic damage. Applies [Brilliance] debuff that remains for 10 seconds when damage is dealt by Divine Stigma.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Duration of Stigma: CaptionTime seconds
Ignores Defense of Stigma target by 8%
Stigma targets: CaptionRatio3

skills.name: Piety
skills.description: Damages the enemy under [Brilliance]. (Skill cannot be used when there are no enemies under [Brilliance].)

attributes.name: Zaibas: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Zaibas] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Aukuras: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases skill factor of [Divine Stigma] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Krivis: Fire Property Resistance
attributes.description: * Increases the character's Fire property resistance and decreases dark property resistance by 5 and 3 per attribute level respectively

attributes.name: Zalciai: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Zalciai]'s Critical damage increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* Additional increase by 10% at maximum level

attributes.name: Divine Stigma: Defeat Demon
attributes.description:
* For the devil-type enemy, increases the duration of [Divine Stigma] by 1 second per attribute level

Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Divine Stigma: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases skill factor of [Divine Stigma] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Zalciai: Critical
attributes.description: * Increases the minimum critical chance of Krivis skills by 5% when under the [Zalciai] buff

attributes.name: Physical Stat: Krivis
attributes.description:
* Stat Growth Ratio of Krivis is changed.

* INT ↔ STR, SPR ↔ DEX

* Skill property of Krivis is applied as [Physical]-[Strike]

attributes.name: [Arts] Zaibas: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Zaibas] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Divine Stigma: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Divine Stigma] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Zaibas: Catatumbo
attributes.description:
* Increases the range and damage of [Zaibas] magic circle by 3 times

* Duration is changed to 10 seconds, Strike period is changed to 0.5 seconds from 0.15 seconds

* Number of enemies hit by the attack increases up to 15 (5 during PvP)

Increases cooldown by 5 seconds

attributes.name: Piety: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases skill factor of [Piety] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Piety: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Piety] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Daino: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Daino]'s Accuracy, Block Penetration increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Piety: Focus
attributes.description:
* Increases damage with [Piety] skill by 50% when the number of target is 5 or under

* Increases damage by 10% when the number of target decreases. (max.90%)

attributes.name: Aukuras: Brilliance
attributes.description: * Activates Aura to the caster for 30 seconds when using Aukuras. Continuously apply [Brilliance] debuff to the enemy near the caster by 120 range.
